title: AI reply email drafting in CRM

posts.author: NielsLA (Niels)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We are using monday CRM with Emails and Activities for lead and sales communication. In ‘Monday Service’ there is a powerful AI assistant that can draft replies to incoming emails, using all item context from the ticket. This allows the AI to prepare a contextual email reply as a draft, instead of only generating new outbound messages.

https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/24275522291602-AI-assistant-on-monday-service

What are you trying to achieve

We would like AI reply functionality available to be enabled in monday CRM — including the ability to draft replies to existing email conversations.

This would significantly streamline follow-ups, reduce manual writing time, and help sales teams respond faster and more consistently directly inside the CRM.

posts.author: NielsLA (Niels)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday,

Would be awesome to reply with AI as it is possible with Monday ‘Service’. Any change this will be possible?
